originalTitle: Live RL dev on PufferLib with Joseph Suarez
title: Debugging Performance Disparity in Multi-Threaded Vectorization for PufferLib
summary: Diagnosed and fixed a performance gap in the multi-threaded environment vectorization backend. Addressed compiler optimization issues, shared library symbol exports, and CUDA stream synchronization, achieving 12 million steps per second. Began general refactoring for pre-alpha release.
